summary: Comprehensive testing of PRONOKIF F1 app new features: Avatars (45 total), Missions (35), Mini-games (Reaction & Batak), Global Leaderboard. All backend APIs working (44/44 tests passed). Frontend pages loading and functional.

backend_new_features: GET /api/avatars - Returns 45 avatars (15 default, 10 teams, 20 drivers)
POST /api/minigames/reaction - Competition mode with attempt tracking
POST /api/minigames/batak - Competition mode with attempt tracking
backend_existing_features: All 23 original API tests passed (auth, leagues, predictions, etc.)
frontend: Profile page loads with avatar display
Avatar modal shows 4 categories (Classiques, Écuries, Pilotes, Photo)
Level and XP display on profile
Global ranking position shown on profile (#4)
Missions page loads with 4 category tabs
Missions page shows progress bars and XP rewards
MiniGames page loads with Training/Competition modes
Reaction game shows F1 lights out interface
Global Leaderboard page loads with podium
Podium shows top 3 players with avatars

features_verified.avatars: Working - 45 avatars across 4 categories (default, teams, drivers, custom upload)
features_verified.avatar_selection: Working - Can select and change avatar
features_verified.avatar_upload: Working - Custom photo upload with base64 encoding
features_verified.missions_system: Working - 35 missions across 4 categories with progress tracking
features_verified.missions_xp_rewards: Working - XP rewards displayed (50-1500 XP range)
features_verified.user_stats: Working - Stats tracked for predictions, wins, etc.
features_verified.reaction_game: Working - F1 lights out sequence with reaction timing
features_verified.global_leaderboard: Working - All players ranked by total points
features_verified.podium_display: Working - Top 3 players shown in podium format
features_verified.xp_level_system: Working - Level and XP displayed on profile

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All new pages and features working

seed_data_creation: Used existing test user with mini-game results already recorded
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features (Avatars, Missions, Mini-games, Global Leaderboard) are fully functional. Test user has avatar_id='driver_1' (number 1 driver avatar). Mini-game leaderboards show TestPilote at #1 with 220ms reaction time. Global leaderboard has 6 players total. The backend test file test_pronokif_features_v2.py covers all new endpoints.
